basic_details.job_title: Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years as on 01-08-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate Degree (Minimum 60 Percent Marks or equivalent) in any discipline from a recognized University
qualification.details: Post-Graduate Degree (Minimum 60 Percent Marks or equivalent) in any discipline from a recognized University.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications based on qualification and experience MCQ based exam (50 Marks) Personal Interview (50 Marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Ministry of Civil Aviation Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Young Professional post is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post-Graduate Degree with a minimum of 60 percent marks or an equivalent grade in any discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional post is 30 years as of 1st August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, an MCQ-based exam (50 marks), and a personal interview (50 marks).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 54,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Young Professional post in the Ministry of Civil Aviation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The Young Professional position is a contractual role within the Ministry of Civil Aviation.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Ministry of Civil Aviation located?
faq.answer: The Ministry of Civil Aviation is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003.
